Search Results for

    Show / Hide Table of Contents

    Struct AffineTransform

    Represents an affine transform in 3D space, with two mutually exclusive representantions:

    • As a 4x3 Matrix. When IsMatrix is true.
      Publicly exposed as Matrix.
    • As a Scale/Rotation/Translation chain. When IsSRT is true.
      Publicly exposed as: Scale, Rotation, Translation.
    Inherited Members
    ValueType.ToString()
    object.Equals(object, object)
    object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
    object.GetType()
    Namespace: Aspose.CAD.FileFormats.GLB.Transforms
    Assembly: Aspose.CAD.dll
    Syntax
    public readonly struct AffineTransform : IEquatable<AffineTransform>
    Remarks

    Depending on how AffineTransform structures are created, the underlaying
    fields must be interpreted as a Matrix4x3 or a Scale/Rotation/Translation chain.

    This approach allows AffineTransform preserving the source transform, avoiding loosing
    precission when decomposing a matrix, or creating a matrix from a SRT chain.

    Decomposing matrices is tricky because not all valid matrices can be decomposed; in particular
    squewed matrices will fail to decompose.

    AffineTransform(Vector3?, Quaternion?, Vector3?)

    Fields

    Name Description
    Identity

    Properties

    Name Description
    IsIdentity
    IsLosslessDecomposable

    Gets a value indicating whether this transform can be decomposed to SRT without precission loss.
    IsMatrix

    Gets a value indicating whether this AffineTransform represents a Matrix4x4.
    IsSRT

    Gets a value indicating whether this AffineTransform represents a SRT chain.
    IsValid
    Matrix

    Gets the Matrix4x4 transform of the current AffineTransform
    Rotation

    Gets the rotation.
    Scale

    Gets the scale.
    Translation

    Gets the translation

    Name Description

    Checks whether two transform represent the same geometric spatial transformation.

    Inverts the specified transform. The return value indicates whether the operation succeeded.
